bead.title: test: implement TP-020 agent-routing-and-catalog-resolution acceptance tests
bead.description: TP-020 defines ~10 test-case groups (request normalization, catalog projection, candidate planning, ranking, embedded boundary, CLI/config, capabilities/doctor). Currently zero test files match TestAgentRoute* or the TP-020 case ids. Routing logic is changing as deletion debt in ddx-ac5c7fdb moves upstream — but the acceptance surface should be stable enough to start pinning.
bead.acceptance: cli/internal/agent/routing_test.go (or equivalent) covers at least the canonical TP-020 TC groups: request normalization, candidate planning, ranking. 'cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run Route -count=1' green.
